details.test: Task 1: Buy two 400W-class panels under $300 (highest rating)
Task 2: Add cheapest solar panel (search + price filter)
Task 3: Build residential bundle under $6000 (multi-item cart with swap)
Task 4: Request 50kW commercial rooftop quote (ZIP 94103, Q3 2025)
Task 5: Find nearest installer within 50 miles of 30301 offering EV charging
Task 6: Access technical datasheet for SPX-400 panel
Task 7: Select quieter generator analog and add parallel kit stand-in
Task 9: Find 2025 solar tax credits article (2024+) and subscribe to newsletter topics
